title: chrysanthemum manshuricum
intro: Chrysanthemum manshuricum, also known as Korean chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family that is native to East Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties, which are attributed to its high content of flavonoids and volatile oils. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum manshuricum include reducing fever, relieving headaches and other respiratory issues, and protecting against oxidative stress and inflammation. In traditional Chinese medicine, the plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in herbal soups and other remedies to promote overall well-being and prevent illnesses.
